You are here: Parliament home page > MPs, Lords & offices > Standards and financial interests > Parliamentary Commissioner for Standards > Registers of Interests > Register of All-Party Parliamentary Groups

Register Of All-Party Parliamentary Groups [as at 23 February 2026] Internet, Communications and Technology

Title

Parliamentary Internet, Communications and Technology Forum All-Party Parliamentary Group

Purpose

The APPG brings together parliamentarians from all parties and both Houses with key players in the internet, communications and technology sectors to engage with the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.

Category

Subject Group

 

Officers

Role

Name

Party

Chair & Registered Contact

Dame Caroline Dinenage

Conservative

Co-Chair

Samantha Niblett

Labour

Treasurer

Baroness Neville-Rolfe

Conservative

Officer

Lord Clement-Jones

Liberal Democrat

 

Contact Details

Registered Contact:

Dame Caroline Dinenage MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. Tel: 020 7219 7078; 020 7219 0198.

Email: caroline.dinenage.mp@parliament.uk

 

Public Enquiry Point:

Kirsty Allan, Lodestone Communications

Email: k.a@lodestonecommunications.com

 

Secretariat:

Lodestone Communications acts as the group's secretariat. https://lodestonecommunications.com/

 

Group's Website:

https://pictfor.org.uk/

 

 

Inaugural and Annual General Meetings (IGMs and AGMs)

Date of IGM or most recent AGM in this Parliament

10/02/2026

Did the group approve an income and expenditure statement at the AGM above? (not applicable to IGMs)

Yes

Reporting year

21 Oct to 20 Oct

Next reporting deadline

21/02/2027
